# v0.1.14

## 更新说明

### 新增

- 管理界面支持中文 / English 切换，巡检结果、状态和错误提示会同步使用所选语言
- 新增对明确 `HTTP 402 personal-team-blocked:spending-limit` 的识别，并单独归类为「额度/订阅受限」
- 实时自动禁用支持处理 402；402 账号需手动解禁
- 新增自动巡检，可配置巡检开关、执行间隔、并发数和是否包含已禁用账号
- 自动巡检支持分别设置 402、403 账号后续执行「禁用」或「删除」
- 巡检中的手动禁用、启用、删除会同步更新实时自动禁用账号池，并记录手动禁用原因

### 优化

- 优化后台巡检、批量操作和停止操作的状态反馈
- 优化超时、失败和无权限场景的提示及结果分类
- 自动禁用页面新增 402 和手动禁用分类统计与筛选

## 贡献与署名

- 中英文界面切换由 [RaviTharuma](https://github.com/RaviTharuma) 通过 [PR #14](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/pull/14) 贡献
- 自动巡检基于 [Guyungy](https://github.com/Guyungy) 的 [PR #12](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/pull/12)，经修复和适配后并入本版本

## English

### Added

- Added a Chinese / English language switcher for the management UI. Inspection results, statuses, and errors follow the selected language
- Added dedicated detection for the exact `HTTP 402 personal-team-blocked:spending-limit` response
- Realtime auto-ban now supports 402 spending or subscription limits; 402 accounts require manual unban
- Added scheduled inspection with configurable enablement, interval, concurrency, and disabled-account inclusion
- Scheduled inspection can independently disable or delete matching 402 and 403 accounts
- Manual disable, enable, and delete actions from inspection now synchronize with the realtime auto-ban pool

### Improved

- Improved background inspection, bulk-action, and stop-operation status feedback
- Improved timeout, failure, and permission-denied messages and classification
- Added 402 and manually disabled categories to the auto-ban summary and filters

### Contributors

- Chinese / English UI switching was contributed by [RaviTharuma](https://github.com/RaviTharuma) in [PR #14](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/pull/14)
- Scheduled inspection is based on [Guyungy](https://github.com/Guyungy)'s [PR #12](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/pull/12), with fixes and adaptations included in this release
